label: Transparent vampire squid motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Vampire Squid transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a vampire squid motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single vampire squid, biologically plausible but polished for a premium UI catalog: compact mantle, cloak-like webbing spread between arms like a dark burgundy cape, curled arm tips, subtle cirri texture, glossy dark eyes, black-burgundy skin with deep wine gradients, dim blue bioluminescent glow along web edges and tiny photophore points, abyssal marine drama without becoming a horror monster.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; full body visible, cloak webbing open and readable, no cropped arms. Clean studio lighting that preserves burgundy-black detail and blue glow accents, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no ocean scene, no rocks, no bubbles, no second animal, no cartoon mascot, no vampire character, no teeth, no blood, no text, no watermark, no logo, no props, no floor plane.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Vampire Squid light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Vampire Squid", derived from a vampire squid cloak motif. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible dramatic dashboard system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide board, target 3840x2160 high-resolution source asset. Use a crisp professional grid with large readable labels and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Vampire Squid, Vampire Squid, Deep Ocean, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Operations Dashboard, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Extract color and interaction language from a vampire squid cloak: black-burgundy webbing, deep wine mantle, blue bioluminescent edge glow, dim abyss neutrals, glossy dark eyes, small photophore dots, cape-like radial arm rhythm. The board must read as deep ocean and dramatic dashboard, not generic purple SaaS.
Palette labels to render clearly: Abyss Pearl, Cloak Black, Bloodwine Burgundy, Photophore Blue, Deep Pelagic, Webbing Maroon, Dim Plankton, Ink Slate, Signal Cyan.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese UI guidance; show short labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Deep Sea, Active, Warning. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, text input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, metric cards, table rows, command palette, search bar, left sidebar navigation, top toolbar, incident/status chips, uptime counters, dashboard metric cards, line chart for abyss telemetry, bar chart for sensor load, donut chart for risk states, compact data table, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, 8px radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple lucide-style icons.
Style: dramatic but readable product UI, pearl-gray light background, ink and burgundy panels, blue glow focus rings, compact dashboard workflow density, cloak-web radial dividers, subtle photophore dot texture, dim marine neutrals, shadcn/tweakcn token-driven components.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no horror/blood imagery despite the name, no stock photo background, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Vampire Squid", no watermark, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Vampire Squid dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Vampire Squid". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode, while staying derived from a vampire squid cloak motif.
Canvas: exact 16:9 wide board, target 3840x2160 high-resolution source asset. Use a crisp professional grid with large readable labels and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Vampire Squid, Vampire Squid, Deep Ocean, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Operations Dashboard, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Reference use: Preserve the same system language: black-burgundy cloak webbing, deep wine mantle, dim abyss cards, blue bioluminescent edge glow, glossy dark eyes, small photophore dots, cape-like radial arm rhythm, compact operational dashboard density.
Palette labels to render clearly: Abyss Black, Abyss Pearl, Cloak Black, Bloodwine Burgundy, Photophore Blue, Deep Pelagic, Webbing Maroon, Dim Plankton, Ink Slate, Signal Cyan.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese UI guidance; show short labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Deep Sea, Active, Warning. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: primary and secondary buttons, icon buttons, text input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, metric cards, table rows, command palette, search bar, left sidebar navigation, top toolbar, incident/status chips, uptime counters, dashboard metric cards, line chart for abyss telemetry, bar chart for sensor load, donut chart for risk states, compact data table, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, 8px radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple lucide-style icons.
Visual details: deep blue-black background rather than pure black, burgundy-black cards, pearl readable foreground, burgundy primary buttons, photophore-blue focus rings and chart highlights, subtle blue glow, cloak-web radial dividers, restrained marine neutrals, dramatic dashboard system.
Constraints: no neon overload, no generic purple/blue gradients, no horror/blood imagery despite the name, no pure flat black-only background, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Vampire Squid", no watermark, no illegible microtext.
